info.name: Attendify - Delegate API
info.description: Professional API collection for Attendify Delegate features. Includes Dashboard, Schedule, Attendance, Assignments, Announcements, and Communication.

request.description: Get comprehensive dashboard data: Stats (Lectures, Alerts, Weekly Rate), Subjects list, Top absent students, and Recent attendance.
Returns subject with its doctor, term, resources, and assignments.
Returns stats and list of resources.
Paginated list of students in the delegate's batch.
